home.title: Jump right in, even on your first game
home.description: A 5-player turn-based great power management game. Each turn you make limited choices across three phases—National Decision, Market Sales, and Fiscal Settlement—see the results roll into the next round, and compete for the highest cumulative total income.

asideCard.eyebrow: You only need to know 4 steps before entering the lobby
asideCard.title: 4 Steps to Your First Game
asideCard.description: No need to read long rules upfront. The system guides you through identity confirmation, room preparation, and auto-start.
steps: Confirm your nickname—the system uses it as your identity on this device.
Enter the lobby, then create a room or join one that's waiting.
After entering a room, pick a nation to represent in this match.
Once everyone clicks ready, the system auto-starts Round 1.

cycleCard.title: The Three-Phase Cycle
cycleCard.description: You won't need to memorize a wall of rules. Just follow this fixed cycle each round—results from one phase flow into the next round's operations.

decision.title: National Decision
decision.desc: Allocate budgets across factories, government policies, market previews, military, and research—setting the stage for the phases ahead.

market.title: Market Sales
market.desc: Sell goods on domestic and overseas markets. Supply and demand determine prices; sales convert directly into national income.

settlement.title: Fiscal Settlement
settlement.desc: Aggregate income and redistribute it proportionally into consumer purchasing power, factories, and government finance—rolling into the next round.

lobbyCard.title: Your Path to a Room
lobbyCard.description: The home page tells you what this game is. Creating rooms, picking games, and resuming progress all happen in the lobby.
steps: Confirm your nickname, then follow the lobby's guided flow.
The lobby shows which rooms are waiting for players and how to resume your last session.
Join a room, pick your nation, click Ready. The game starts automatically when everyone's ready.

settings.title: Settings
settings.numericConfigDescription: Above are common balance items; the bottom 'All JSON Numeric Values' section auto-lists remaining numbers from config files. Saving writes back to backend/config/balance/*.json and clears the config cache.
settings.allJsonValuesDescription: Lists all numeric values not shown in the dedicated panels above. Chinese names are for reference; the gray path indicates the JSON location. Modify and click Save at the top to apply.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.hint: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
